creator: jarrod@netleader.com.au
text:
The default for the NRPE sources is still to have SSL disabled.  I  
know it all sounds nice to enable SSL by default but an SSL'd nrpe2  
has no way of accepting non-SSL'd connections, i.e., no backwards  
compatibility.  So, a users large installation *may* start to fall  
apart if the head end isn't SSL capable, and even if it did, would  
need command duplication to add the -n option for those hosts.

Personally, I think changing the default would break POLA, so I can't  
approve the patch.

Jarrod.
